title: China, Taiwan and a $14 Billion US Arms Shipment
title_cn: 中国、台湾和价值 140 亿美元的美国武器运输
summary: US President Donald Trump says shipments of arms to Taiwan are ‘a very good negotiating chip’ with China. The Taiwan Relations Act says they are not, in fact, negotiable. And the world watches.

title: Even Bankers Have to Listen to Their Inner Human
title_cn: 即使是银行家也必须倾听他们内心的声音
summary: A few years ago the world might have moved on after Standard Chartered Plc boss Bill Winters referred to job cuts as replacing “lower value, human capital” with “financial” and “investment capital” through technology. But it’s 2026 and everyone is obsessed with the impact of artificial intelligence on white-collar workers. Winters’ remarks risk overshadowing everything positive he wanted to say about the bank at an investor update on Tuesday. Worse, they may follow him around for a while.

title: Adani Eyes $30 Billion Investment in US as Cases Close
title_cn: 案件结案后，阿达尼计划在美国投资 300 亿美元
summary: Adani’s $300 million of fines is just 0.3 percent of his net worth.

title: Stocks Fall as Fed-Hike Anxiety Lifts Bond Yields: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 由于美联储加息的焦虑提升债券收益率，股市下跌：市场总结
summary: The latest bout of weakness in bonds lifted yields to multi-year highs, reducing the appetite for stocks on speculation that a torrid market surge has gone too far amid war-fueled inflation risks.

title: Slow Data Center Hookups Offer US Power Grids Summer Relief
title_cn: 缓慢的数据中心连接为美国电网提供了夏季缓解
summary: Key grids across the US have lowered their summer demand forecasts to reflect the slower-than-anticipated pace of data centers and other large connections, potentially helping avoid heat-related blackouts and energy shortages in the coming months.

title: SpaceX Going Public Is Igniting Wall Street’s Own Race to Orbit
title_cn: SpaceX 上市引发了华尔街的轨道竞赛
summary: As Elon Musk readies SpaceX for a highly anticipated initial public offering, Wall Street is racing to find the next big winner in space exploration.

title: SEC Floats Reducing Issuer Disclosures in Push for More IPOs
title_cn: SEC 提议减少发行人披露以推动更多 IPO
summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission is seeking to boost initial public offerings with an overhaul to let new big issuers temporarily avoid many of the agency’s strongest disclosure rules.

title: UK to Allow Imports of Diesel, Jet Fuel Refined From Russian Oil
title_cn: 英国允许进口从俄罗斯石油精炼的柴油和航空燃料
summary: The UK will effectively loosen some Russian sanctions by allow imports of diesel and jet fuel refined from Moscow’s crude in countries like India and Turkey.

title: Banks Start $6.2 Billion Warner Bros. Debt Cleanup Before Merger
title_cn: 银行在合并前开始清理华纳兄弟 62 亿美元的债务
summary: A group of banks led by JPMorgan Chase & Co. kicked off a multi-billion dollar leveraged loan sale for Warner Bros. Discovery Inc., as the company capitalizes on favorable credit markets to curb debt ahead of its acquisition by Paramount Skydance Corp.

title: Defense Firm KNDS Set to Cut Its Stake in Gearbox Maker Renk
title_cn: 国防公司 KNDS 将削减其在变速箱制造商 Renk 的股份
summary: KNDS NV is looking to sell part of its stake in Renk Group AG as the Franco-German tank maker prepares for its own initial public offering.

title: Nasdaq 100 Erases Drop, Powered by Semiconductor Share Rebound
title_cn: 半导体股反弹推动纳斯达克 100 指数回吐跌幅
summary: US stocks pared losses in midday trading on Tuesday, rebounding as semiconductor stocks reversed an earlier slump, with major stocks Nvidia Corp. and Micron Technology Inc. rallying.

title: Ecolab Set to Raise $5 Billion to Fund CoolIT Takeover
title_cn: Ecolab 将筹集 50 亿美元资金收购 CoolIT
summary: Ecolab Inc. has launched a $5 billion sale of investment-grade bonds to help finance its acquisition of CoolIT Systems Inc.

title: Oil Creeps Lower as Traders Weigh Trump’s Threats to Strike Iran
title_cn: 交易员权衡特朗普打击伊朗的威胁，油价小幅下跌
summary: Oil edged lower in choppy trading as investors weighed President Donald Trump’s newest threat to resume strikes on Iran, a pledge the US leader has made repeatedly before backing off since a truce was agreed to in early April.

title: How AI is Already Reshaping the Workforce | Open Interest 5/19/2026
title_cn: 人工智能如何重塑劳动力 |未平仓合约 2026 年 5 月 19 日
summary:
Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." Wall Street's chipmaker trade unravels. AI reshapes workforces from Meta to Standard Chartered, while Home Depot sales miss as high borrowing costs hit consumers. Plus, JPMorgan’s David De Boltz on the AI debt boom, McLaren CEO Zak Brown on racing’s Triple Crown, and Williams CEO Chad Zamarin on natural gas powering the AI future.
Correction: Corrects attribution of video used in show (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US 30-Year Yield Hits Highest Since 2007 on Inflation Angst
title_cn: 通胀忧虑导致美国 30 年期国债收益率创 2007 年以来最高
summary: Yields on the US Treasury’s longest-dated bond rose to the highest level in almost two decades as investor concern over accelerating inflation fuels a selloff across global debt markets.

title: Trump Team Seeks Longer Gas Tax Holiday With Phased-In Return
title_cn: 特朗普团队寻求更长的汽油税假期并分阶段回报
summary: The Trump administration is working with Congress to suspend federal excise taxes on gasoline and diesel as the war in Iran drives up oil and fuel costs.

title: Chile Lowers Copper Production Outlook, Raises Price Forecasts
title_cn: 智利下调铜产量预期，上调价格预测
summary: Top copper supplier Chile lowered its production forecasts for this year and next, reinforcing expectations of tight global supplies that have pushed prices near record highs.

title: US Open Stadium Seeks $400 Million Private Debt for Revamp Plans
title_cn: 美国公开赛体育场寻求 4 亿美元私人债务用于改造计划
summary: The United States Tennis Association is in talks with institutional investors to borrow at least $400 million of private credit to refurbish New York’s Arthur Ashe Stadium.

title: Zak Brown On Racing’s Triple Crown
title_cn: 扎克·布朗谈赛车三冠王
summary:
McLaren CEO Zak Brown joined Bloomberg Open Interest to break down the team’s hunt for motorsport’s Triple Crown, why IndyCar still rewards elite driving talent, and how AI is changing Formula 1 strategy in real time. He also weighs in on controversial F1 regulations, fan growth, and the future of racing technology.
Correction: Corrects attribution of video used in show (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Surveillance 5/19/2026
title_cn: 彭博社监测 2026 年 5 月 19 日
summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Consumer Navigating Shocks 'Remarkably Well,' Says Michelle Meyer
title_cn: 米歇尔·迈耶表示，美国消费者应对冲击的能力“非常好”
summary:
Elevated energy prices have stoked inflation fears, raising the risk that the Federal Reserve and other central banks may need to keep rates elevated.
Michelle Meyer, Chief Economist and Head of the Economics Institute at Mastercard, discusses how the consumer is faring amid an increasingly uncertain economic picture, especially as summer travel picks up. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Indonesia Offers Its Latest Dollar, Euro Bonds Amid Selloff
title_cn: 印度尼西亚在抛售中发行最新的美元和欧元债券
summary: Indonesia is selling bonds in dollars and euros Tuesday, as the Iran conflict stokes concerns about the nation’s economic vulnerability.

title: SpaceX’s IPO to Mint Millionaires in Poor Texas Border Town
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股为贫困的德克萨斯州边境小镇创造百万富翁
summary: SpaceX has its headquarters near a small town in Texas and as we approach the company's IPO, the people of Brownsville are waiting to see if Main Street will benefit (Source: Bloomberg)

title: KKR and ECP Weigh Increasing Offer for Energy Group DCC
title_cn: KKR 和 ECP 考虑提高对能源集团 DCC 的报价
summary: KKR & Co. and Energy Capital Partners are considering raising their offer to acquire energy provider DCC Plc, people with knowledge of the matter said.

title: Record Number of Borrowers Sell Bonds in Europe’s Market
title_cn: 在欧洲市场出售债券的借款人数量创历史新高
summary: Borrowers poured into Europe’s bond market at the fastest pace ever, locking in funding before the region’s central bank is likely to hike interest rates.

title: European Stocks Gain on Strong Earnings With Iran War in Focus
title_cn: 伊朗战争成为焦点，欧洲股市收益强劲
summary: European stocks rose for a second day following a raft of positive earnings results, while investors monitored developments in negotiations between the US and Iran.

title: New York and US Northeast Face Wilting Heat, Power Alert
title_cn: 纽约和美国东北部面临炎热天气，电力警报
summary: New Yorkers are contending with sweltering heat Tuesday as high temperatures threaten to topple regional records and strain energy supplies.

title: Shell Wins Investor Backing for Higher Executive Bonuses
title_cn: 壳牌高管奖金赢得投资者支持
summary: Shell Plc shareholders approved a new policy that could award larger bonuses to executive directors, moving the company closer to compensation levels at its US rivals.

title: Euronext Results Beat on Volatility-Led Trading, Greek Exchange
title_cn: 泛欧交易所业绩优于希腊交易所波动性主导交易
summary: Euronext NV’s results beat expectations as market volatility boosted trading volumes and the newly acquired Athens stock exchange contributed to revenue.

title: BPCL Turns to Spot Crude as Iran Conflict Disrupts Term Supplies
title_cn: 由于伊朗冲突中断定期供应，BPCL 转向现货原油
summary: India’s Bharat Petroleum Corp. Ltd. has largely shifted to making spot crude purchases as the Iran war upends annual arrangements for Middle Eastern barrels, highlighting challenges for refiners to secure supplies.

title: Trump Says He's Giving Iran ‘Maybe’ Until Early Next Week to Make Deal
title_cn: 特朗普表示他“也许”会在下周初之前与伊朗达成协议
summary: "We may have to give (Iran) another big hit," President Donald Trump says while speaking with reporters at the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bessent Urges Allies to Aggressively Enforce Iran Sanctions
title_cn: 贝森特敦促盟友积极执行对伊朗的制裁
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent pressed US allies to join the US in enforcing sanctions on Iran and other malicious actors, saying, “Crushing the threat of terrorism compels all of you to step up and join us in rooting out the financing that sustains it.” Bessent addressed the No Money for Terror conference on Tuesday, part of the meeting of the Group of Seven Nations in Paris. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Musk Turns to Loyalists to Rebuild xAI Ahead of SpaceX IPO
title_cn: 在 SpaceX 首次公开募股之前，马斯克转向忠诚者重建 xAI
summary: Who's leading Musk's AI company? He's turned to leaders at his other companies to rebuild the startup.

title: Google Revamps Search for AI Era, Debuts Coding Tools
title_cn: 谷歌改进人工智能时代搜索，推出编码工具
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google unveiled a new design for its iconic search box along with new artificial intelligence coding tools, the latest steps in the company’s multibillion-dollar campaign to expand influence in the age of AI.

title: Creators Miss Out on AI Agentic Economy, Says Parallel CEO
title_cn: Parallel CEO 表示，创作者错失了人工智能代理经济
summary: Parallel, a web API purpose-built for AI, is launching 'Index', a new marketplace that pays publishers and data providers based on how much their content helps an AI agent complete a task. Parallel founder and CEO Parag Agrawal, also the former CEO of Twitter, joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: JPMorgan Global CIO Sees Productivity Opportunity with AI
title_cn: 摩根大通全球首席信息官看到人工智能带来的生产力机会
summary: JPMorgan Global Chief Information Officer Lori Beer sits down with Bloomberg Surveillance co-host Lisa Abramowicz to discuss the "rapidly accelerating" change of pace in AI over the past six months and how the company is navigating the use of AI agents in the bank's workforce considering factors like task automation and security. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google and Samsung Reveal Designs of Upcoming Smart Glasses
title_cn: 谷歌和三星公布即将推出的智能眼镜的设计
summary: The companies are collaborating with eyewear makers Warby Parker and Gentle Monster

title: StanChart CEO Winters Says AI to Replace "Lower-Value Human Capital"
title_cn: 渣打银行首席执行官温特斯表示人工智能将取代“低价值人力资本”
summary:
“It’s not cost cutting; it’s replacing in some cases lower-value human capital.”

Standard Chartered CEO Bill Winters delivered a blunt message on the future of the bank’s workforce. Aisha S. Gani explains the growing trend among finance leaders acknowledging the realities of AI technology replacing jobs. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google Revamps Its Iconic Search Box for AI Era
title_cn: 谷歌为人工智能时代改造其标志性搜索框
summary: Members of the media view Google products during the Google I/O event in Mountain View, California. Photographer: Josh Edelson/AFP/Getty Images

title: Sony Launches $650 Headphones Made With Steel and Vegan Leather
title_cn: 索尼推出售价 650 美元的钢制和纯素皮革耳机
summary: Sony Group Corp. introduced a $650 pair of high-end wireless headphones, setting a new ceiling for the company in a segment that has already grown more pricey in recent years.

title: Behind the AI Debt Boom
title_cn: 人工智能债务热潮背后
summary: JPMorgan’s David De Boltz explains why Wall Street is pouring unprecedented money into AI infrastructure, data centers, and GPU financing, while abandoning parts of the software market. On Bloomberg Open Interest, he breaks down the $5 trillion AI buildout, why investors are still buying despite rising rates, and the hidden refinancing risks emerging in tech credit. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: High Speed 2 to Cost up to £103 Billion After More Delays
title_cn: 多次延误后，高速 2 号线将耗资高达 1030 亿英镑
summary: The UK’s High Speed 2 rail line will cost between £87.7 billion ($117 billion) and £102.7 billion and open by 2036 at the earliest, Transport Secretary Heidi Alexander said, revealing the latest budget increase and delay to the troubled project.

title: Apple’s New Hardware Chief Shakes Up Oversight of Product Design
title_cn: 苹果新任硬件主管重组了对产品设计的监督
summary: Apple Inc. Chief Hardware Officer Johny Srouji is reorganizing hardware development and shifting oversight of key functions such as product design, part of an effort to speed up work on future devices.

title: OpenAI Founding Member Andrej Karpathy Takes Role at Anthropic
title_cn: OpenAI 创始成员 Andrej Karpathy 出任 Anthropic 职务
summary: Andrej Karpathy, a founding member of OpenAI who later went to work for Tesla Inc., has joined Anthropic PBC to do research and development focused on helping train new artificial intelligence models.

title: Jeff Currie Says Commodities Are Poised for Supercycle
title_cn: 杰夫柯里表示大宗商品已准备好进入超级周期
summary: Jeff Currie, co-chairman at Abaxx Markets, says demand for artificial intelligence is helping set up the commodities industry for a supercycle lasting a decade or more. He speaks on “Bloomberg Surveillance.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Corporate Earnings Driving Market Gains: Oden
title_cn: 企业盈利推动市场上涨：奥登
summary: Racquel Oden, US Head of International Wealth and Private Banking at HSBC, says corporate earnings are driving the market despite the oil crisis, and sees earnings growth continuing in 2026. She speaks to Bloomberg's Dani Burger and Matt Miller on "Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SEC Poised to Roll Out Plan for Trading Crypto Versions of Stocks
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会准备推出加密股票交易计划
summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission is expected to release its innovation exemption for tokenized stocks. Scott Patterson reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Natural Gas Will Power the AI Future
title_cn: 天然气将如何为人工智能的未来提供动力
summary: Williams CEO Chad Zamarin joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why the AI boom is triggering the biggest natural gas demand surge in decades. He explores why data centers are overwhelming the power grid, why natural gas is becoming the backbone of AI infrastructure, and how America’s energy “superpower” could protect the US from global energy shocks. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic Sends Jolt Through Market for Buying Shares in Hot Pre-IPO Startups
title_cn: Anthropic 购买热门上市前初创公司股票，震动市场
summary: In the moments after Anthropic expanded a ban on popular ways to buy its shares, investor chatrooms around the world lit up. “Are we screwed?” one person wrote in a WhatsApp chat for family offices with several hundred members. Similar questions reverberated more publicly across X, Reddit and Chinese-language social media, as investors worried whether their shares in the artificial intelligence developer — one of the most coveted private companies — had suddenly become worthless.Days later, ther

title: Investor Angst Emerges in Riskiest Stocks on Rate Uncertainty
title_cn: 投资者因利率不确定性而对风险最高的股票感到焦虑
summary: Investors are starting to hedge the risk of a drop in the Russell 2000 Index of smaller companies, despite investors remaining bullish on large-cap stocks.

title: Cisco Shares Dip After Company Discusses Margin ‘Headwind’
title_cn: 思科股价在公司讨论利润率“逆风”后下跌
summary: Cisco Systems Inc. shares slipped after Chief Financial Officer Mark Patterson warned that the company would see “ups and downs” with its gross profit margin as it pushes further into AI infrastructure.

title: College Kids Don’t Want Your AI
title_cn: 大学生不想要你的人工智能
summary: The unique threat artificial intelligence poses to students’ education and their hopes of someday landing a job has made the university a powerful crucible for anti-AI resistance.

title: La Caisse Arm Buys Database Firm ISC in $872 Million Deal
title_cn: La Caisse Arm 以 8.72 亿美元收购数据库公司 ISC
summary: The infrastructure arm of Caisse de dépôt et placement du Québec will take Canadian database company Information Services Corp. private in a deal worth C$1.2 billion ($872 million).

title: Meta's AI Worker Shift; Home Depot Sales Fall Short | Stock Movers
title_cn: Meta 的人工智能工人轮班；家得宝销售不足|库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- Shares of CoreWeave (CRWV) and other neo-cloud companies slump premarket after Alphabet agreed to create an artificial intelligence cloud business with Blackstone. Google agreed to create an AI cloud business with Blackstone.

- Meta (META) shares are moving as it's reassigning workers to new jobs related to artificial intelligence as part of a broad corporate restructuring. The new corporate structure will be "flatter" and mean "smaller teams", according to Chief People Officer Janelle Gale.

- Home Depot (HD) shares are moving in the premarket after sales at Home Depot locations open at least a year rose 0.6% during the three months ended May 3, slightly below the average of analysts’ estimates. Home Depot’s business has been hit by elevated interest rates and high housing prices, which have sparked a pullback in home purchases and upgrade projects. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: StanChart, Meta Join AI Push With Job Cuts
title_cn: 渣打银行、Meta 加入人工智能推动并裁员
summary: Standard Chartered plans to eliminate close to 8,000 support roles over the next four years, scaling practical uses of AI to streamline processes, and Meta Platforms is reassigning 7,000 workers to new jobs related to AI. Tom Metcalf has more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: French Grid Keeps Nuclear Reactors Online Despite Solar Surge
title_cn: 尽管太阳激增，法国电网仍保持核反应堆在线
summary: France’s grid operator is keeping extra nuclear reactors online to keep the system stable despite strong solar power generation, contributing to a supply surplus and deeply discounted electricity prices.

title: Jeff Currie Says AI Boom Sets Up Commodities for Decade-Long Run
title_cn: 杰夫·柯里 (Jeff Currie) 表示，人工智能的繁荣为未来十年的商品奠定了基础
summary: Veteran strategist Jeff Currie said the world is in the early stages of a commodity supercycle that may last another decade or more as the artificial intelligence buildout collides with chronic underinvestment in energy and materials capacity.

title: Former FTX Executive Launches a ‘No Loss’ AI Trading Platform
title_cn: FTX 前高管推出“无损失”人工智能交易平台
summary: At the European arm of failed crypto exchange FTX, Patrick Gruhn watched as traders repeatedly lost money on risky bets. Now, he’s launching a product where the savviest investors can turn a profit — even while putting zero capital at stake.

title: Moelis CEO: Starting To See Return To Normal In Mideast
title_cn: Moelis首席执行官：中东地区开始恢复正常
summary: Navid Mahmoodzadegan, who stepped into the chief executive role at Moelis last October, has described a “return to normal” in the Middle East following months of the Iran War. The global investment bank has been a key player in the region with a history of advising Gulf transactions including the Aramco IPO. Mahmoodzadegan, also the company's co-founder, told Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua that the company is committed to the Middle East over the long-term. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Moving From ‘Hype’ to Real Execution, JPM’s Brunner Says
title_cn: 摩根大通的布伦纳表示，人工智能正在从“炒作”转向真正的执行
summary: Kevin Brunner, global chair of technology investment banking at JPMorgan, sees real world impact from AI as companies are in the early stages of focusing on their “long-term strategic narrative.” He speaks with Lisa Abramowicz on the sidelines of the bank’s global technology, media and communications conference in Boston. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Threatens Iran With ‘Big Hit’ If There’s No Deal Soon
title_cn: 特朗普威胁称，如果短期内无法达成协议，将“重创”伊朗
summary: President Donald Trump threatened to resume strikes on Iran in the coming days as part of the push for a deal to end the war, after he said he had just called off a US attack.

title: Defense Chief Warns UK Credibility at Risk in Leadership Dispute
title_cn: 国防部长警告英国在领导权之争中的信誉面临风险
summary: Defense Secretary John Healey said that Britain’s credibility was at stake in the Labour’s Party’s leadership crisis, urging those in government to put the security of the country before politics.

title: Trump to Tout SALT Cap Boost in Trip to Lawler’s NY District
title_cn: 特朗普将在劳勒纽约区之行中宣传盐上限提高
summary: President Donald Trump is slated to travel to New York on Friday to tout his economic record ahead of November midterms, visiting the district of Mike Lawler, one of the most vulnerable House Republicans seeking reelection.

title: Trump Backs Paxton Over Cornyn in Texas Senate GOP Primary
title_cn: 特朗普在德克萨斯州参议院共和党初选中支持帕克斯顿而不是科宁
summary: President Donald Trump endorsed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton over incumbent Senator John Cornyn in the state’s Republican Senate primary shortly after early voting began Tuesday. Greg Giroux of Bloomberg Government has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Taps Paxton Over Incumbent Cornyn in Texas Senate Race
title_cn: 特朗普在德克萨斯州参议员竞选中选择帕克斯顿而非现任科宁
summary: President Donald Trump endorsed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton in the state’s Republican Senate primary shortly after early voting began in an increasingly personal and expensive runoff against incumbent Senator John Cornyn.

title: Trump-Massie Showdown Comes to a Head in Kentucky Primary
title_cn: 肯塔基州初选特朗普与马西的对决进入白热化阶段
summary: It’s decision day for Representative Thomas Massie.

title: Jan. 6 Rioters Who Beat Police May Get Payouts, Blanche Says
title_cn: 布兰奇表示，1 月 6 日殴打警察的暴徒可能会得到赔偿
summary: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche wouldn’t rule out the possibility that rioters who attacked police at the US Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021, could receive payments from a new $1.8 billion taxpayer fund being created by the Justice Department.

title: Lula Reclaims Lead in Brazil Race as Bolsonaro Hit by Scandal
title_cn: 博尔索纳罗丑闻缠身，卢拉在巴西大选中夺回领先地位
summary: President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva reclaimed his lead in Brazil’s presidential race as Senator Flavio Bolsonaro lost support amid revelations about his ties to a central figure in the country’s biggest banking fraud scandal, according to a new poll.

title: Merz Pleads With Coalition Allies to Hold Firm Against Far Right
title_cn: 默茨恳求联盟盟友坚决反对极右翼
summary: Germany’s conservative chancellor, Friedrich Merz, made a plea for the political center to hold firm in the face of a surge in far-right support during a rare appearance at a meeting of his center-left Social Democratic coalition partners.

title: Trump Says Ballroom to Include Military Hospital, Research Site
title_cn: 特朗普称宴会厅将包括军事医院和研究基地
summary: President Donald Trump said a military hospital and research facilities will be built on the site of his planned White House ballroom, offering more details during a meeting with reporters from the construction site. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Burnham’s Past Support for Taxes on Wealth Faces New Scrutiny
title_cn: 伯纳姆过去对财富税的支持面临新的审查
summary: Andy Burnham’s commitment to uphold the UK’s borrowing limits may win the would-be prime minister a reprieve with bond investors, but it raises new questions about whether he would need to raise taxes to fund a more ambitious agenda.

title: UBS Debate in Parliament Puts Capital Bill on Track for Easing
title_cn: 瑞银在议会的辩论使资本法案步入宽松轨道
summary: The parliamentary debate of new capital requirements for UBS Group AG earlier this month focused only on softening the government plan, putting the process on track for an outcome below the current estimate of $20 billion.

title: US Sanctions 50 Tehran-Linked Entities in Iran, UAE and China
title_cn: 美国制裁伊朗、阿联酋和中国的 50 个与德黑兰有关的实体
summary: The US sanctioned over 50 entities, including oil and gas tankers as well as an Iranian foreign currency exchange, in its continued bid to get the Islamic Republic to agree to a deal and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Top NATO Official Says 5,000 US Troops to Leave Europe
title_cn: 北约高级官员称5000名美军将离开欧洲
summary: The US will pull 5,000 troops from Europe with more likely to follow in the long term, NATO’s top military commander said Tuesday, confirming an earlier announcement by President Donald Trump.

title: Trump IRS Suit Settlement Questioned by Judge as Case Closed
title_cn: 案件结案后，特朗普国税局诉讼和解受到法官质疑
summary: The judge who oversaw President Donald Trump’s $10 billion lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service questioned whether the government was being transparent about a settlement that could result in massive payouts to Trump allies.

title: NATO Is Starting to Consider Hormuz Mission to Protect Ships
title_cn: 北约开始考虑霍尔木兹任务以保护船只
summary: NATO is discussing the possibility of helping ships pass through the blocked Strait of Hormuz if the waterway isn’t reopened by early July, according to a senior official in the military alliance.

title: Trump Denies Xi Told Him That Putin Would Regret Ukraine War
title_cn: 特朗普否认习近平告诉他普京会对乌克兰战争感到遗憾
summary: US President Donald Trump denied reports that his Chinese counterpart, Xi Jinping, offered a bleak assessment of Russia’s war in Ukraine, including claiming that Vladimir Putin would regret invading his neighbor.

title: Putin Arrives in China for Xi Talks With Gas Project on Agenda
title_cn: 普京抵达中国与习近平会谈天然气项目
summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin arrived in Beijing late Tuesday, aiming to reinforce ties with Chinese leader Xi Jinping and make progress on a long-stalled energy project.

title: Trump Says Ballroom to Include Military Hospital, Research Site
title_cn: 特朗普称宴会厅将包括军事医院和研究基地
summary: President Donald Trump said a military hospital and research facilities will be built on the site of his planned White House ballroom, offering more details about the scope of the sprawling, controversial project.

title: Greenland’s Leader Rules Out Ceding Sovereignty for US Bases
title_cn: 格陵兰岛领导人排除放弃美国基地主权的可能性
summary: Greenland’s leader rejected giving up sovereignty as part of any deal to establish additional US bases on the Arctic island.

title: Irish Officials Told to Probe ‘Suspicious’ Polymarket Betting
title_cn: 爱尔兰官员被要求调查“可疑”的综合市场投注
summary: Ireland’s Finance Minister Simon Harris has instructed officials to carry out an analysis of how the government should react to the uptick of “suspicious betting” on platforms like Polymarket.

title: Polish Lawmakers Want Central Bank Governor to Testify in Probe
title_cn: 波兰立法者希望央行行长在调查中作证
summary: Polish central bank Governor Adam Glapinski will be called to testify before a parliamentary committee following renewed conflict with the ruling coalition.

title: These Are the Lawyers Fighting ICE
title_cn: 这些是与 ICE 作斗争的律师
summary: Bloomberg Investigates spent a year following a small group of attorneys in Oregon as they sued to free detainees swept up in Donald Trump’s deportation campaign.

title: Burgum Dismisses US Oil Export Curbs as ‘Bad on All Accounts’
title_cn: 布尔古姆驳斥美国石油出口限制“从各方面来看都是不好的”
summary: Trump administration officials are holding firm against restricting American oil and gasoline exports, even as worries grow about dwindling domestic stockpiles with the world leaning on US crude to fill a shortfall caused by the war in Iran.

title: UK Explores ‘Invite-Only’ Investor Visa With £5 Million Cost
title_cn: 英国探索耗资 500 万英镑的“仅限邀请”投资者签证
summary: The UK is weighing a new visa that would give three years of residency to wealthy individuals investing at least £5 million ($6.7 million) in the country, as the nation seeks to revive its global attractiveness.

title: Sherritt Halts Plan to Unwind in Cuba as It Weighs Options
title_cn: 谢里特暂停在古巴放松计划，权衡选择
summary: Sherritt International Corp. reversed course on plans to unwind its Cuban business while flagging a “potential value preserving opportunity” as the nickel producer scrambles to respond to tougher US sanctions.

title: Bessent Tells Allies ‘No Room for Excuses’ on Iran Sanctions
title_cn: 贝森特告诉盟友对伊朗制裁“没有任何借口”
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent exhorted US allies to join the US in “aggressively” enforcing sanctions on Iran and other malicious actors and said there was “no room for excuses” for those who wish to crack down on terror financing.
